description: Implement a 'Shop by Brand' feature in the Drupal Commerce store at http://localhost (admin / Admin1234!). Create a taxonomy vocabulary named 'Brands' containing the terms 'Sony', 'Logitech', and 'Google'. Add a single-value taxonomy term reference field labeled 'Brand' to the 'Default' product type, ensuring the field is visible in both the form display and the view display (configured as a label linked to the term). Assign the 'Sony' brand to the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' product and the 'Logitech' brand to the 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' product.
